question: Will the US lift its naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz by May 31, 2026?
evidence: Oil prices dropped by approximately $5 per barrel on Sunday evening following early signs of a possible U.S.-Iran peace deal aimed at ending their ongoing conflict.
